---
title: "Start"
page-layout: full
---

::: {.hero}
::: {.container}
# Start

The fastest path from install to a working model. Follow the core workflow, then expand into conditional or causal examples.

[Start here](start-here.html){.btn .btn-primary}
[Workflow roadmap](../roadmap.html){.btn .btn-outline-light}
[Examples hub](../examples/index.html){.btn .btn-outline-light}
:::
:::

::: {.section}
::: {.container}

::: {.grid-3}

::: {.cardx}
### 1) Minimal end-to-end run
Prove the pipeline works with a small dataset and short MCMC run.
- [Start here](start-here.html)
- [Basic model compile and run](basic-model-compile-run.html)
:::

::: {.cardx}
### 2) Understand backends and workflow
Decide whether CRP or stick-breaking fits your workflow.
- [Backends and workflow](backends-and-workflow.html)
- [Decision Guide](../decision-guide.html)
:::

::: {.cardx}
### 3) If anything breaks
Common setup and runtime issues live here.
- [Troubleshooting](troubleshooting.html)
- [FAQ](../faq.html)
:::

:::

:::
:::

::: {.section}
::: {.container}

## Where the detailed documentation lives
This Quarto site focuses on navigation and workflow. The authoritative API reference and articles live in pkgdown:
- [Pkgdown home](../pkgdown/index.html)
- [API index](../pkgdown/reference/index.html)
- [Articles index](../pkgdown/articles/index.html)

## Recommended next steps
1. Follow the Start workflow end-to-end once.
2. Use Examples for full unconditional, conditional, and causal sequences.
3. Use Kernels to confirm the distribution family that matches your data.

:::
:::
